thesis: {'description': 'One diluted share of AAL, including mid-cycle network operations, AAdvantage co-brand optionality, net financial claims, and cycle/leverage reserve.', 'unit_label': 'diluted share', 'unit_count': 658621000, 'unit_source': 'Q1 2026 net income $382M / diluted EPS $0.58 (AAL/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260423_rpt20260331_acc0000006201_26_000032.htm)', 'enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation': 'Operating network cash is valued once; cash, debt, co-brand option, and cycle reserve are separate additive components with unique overlap keys.'}
